markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore programmatic SEO for Kira's upcoming v2.0 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Recommended Strategy:** Start with editorial content to build domain authority (currently low at \~1.8k backlinks vs. a competitor's 5.5M), then layer in programmatic SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Why Editorial First:** It's a lower-risk way to get fast results and validate topics. A large programmatic launch on a new site risks poor indexing and wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Kira's Opportunity:** The product is ideal for programmatic SEO, as it can generate interactive lessons for specific standards (e.g., "6th grade social studies, Alabama"), creating a massive library of unique, high-value pages.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**GrowthX Process:** A 6-week lead time to an 8-week (or 10-week for holidays) kickoff, focused on rapid publishing to get to measurable results quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

## Topics

### Kira's v2.0 Launch & Programmatic SEO Vision

  - [**Context:** Kira is launching v2.0 in early January, shifting from a sales-led (district-first) to a PLG (teacher-first) model.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [**Product:** A generative platform for interactive educational resources, including:](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [Interactive videos with AI-generated questions and chat.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Full, multi-component lessons (video, chat, assessments).](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Chat environments with goal-based progression.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** Kira creates interactive "lessons," not static "lesson plans" like competitors (e.g., School.ai, Magic School).](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Vision:** Use the product to generate a massive, public library of resources for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [**Lesson Library:** Create a unique page for each of the \~10,000 standards (subject, grade, state).](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [**Interactive Videos:** Generate pages for thousands of educational YouTube videos.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [**Quizzes:** Build and publish large-scale exams.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

### GrowthX's Recommended Strategy: Editorial First

  - [**Rationale:** Kira's low domain authority (\~1.8k backlinks) makes a large-scale programmatic launch risky.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**The Risk:** A large launch could fail to get indexed or rank, wasting significant time and resources.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [**The Solution:** A two-phase approach.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
    1.  **Editorial Content First:**
          - [Build domain authority and topical relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
          - [Generate quick wins with high-intent topics (e.g., "6th grade social studies standards, Alabama").](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
          - [Validate keyword clusters and user signals before committing to a large-scale build.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
    2.  **Programmatic SEO Second:**
          - [Once authority is established, build custom templates and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
          - [Start with small batches (10-20 pages) to test indexing, impressions, and CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
          - [Scale only after seeing strong positive signals.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Benefit:** Editorial content can link to the interactive programmatic pages, creating a powerful, interconnected content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Logistics & Process

  - [**Website Platform:** Kira's site is on Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Not a blocker. For thousands of pages, a database (e.g., Supabase) is more scalable than a CMS like Framer or Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [**GrowthX Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [**Lead Time:** \~6 weeks to kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [**Kickoff Phase:** 8 weeks (or 10 for holiday periods).](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
          - [**Goal:** Unblock all dependencies and get to publishing quickly to gather performance signals.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [**Execution Phase:** Ongoing growth based on data-driven optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kira:** Discuss the proposed editorial-first strategy internally.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**Kira:** Follow up with GrowthX to schedule a deep-dive call with Tyler (Head of Sales) if they wish to proceed.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Send the meeting recording to Tyler for context.](https://fathom.video/share/DRP3k5sLrMQup78pxubNqNqnCTHNhcEF?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
